description:
The CLI has extensive workflow management commands (`workflow phases list/get/upsert/remove`, `workflow pipelines list/upsert`, `workflow config get/validate/compile`, `workflow state-machine get/validate/set`, `workflow agent-runtime get/validate/set`) that have no MCP equivalents. This prevents MCP clients from inspecting or modifying workflow definitions.

## Tools to add
1. `ao.workflow.phases.list` — list phase definitions for a pipeline
2. `ao.workflow.phases.get` — get a specific phase definition
3. `ao.workflow.phases.upsert` — create/update a phase definition
4. `ao.workflow.pipelines.list` — list available pipelines
5. `ao.workflow.pipelines.upsert` — create/update a pipeline
6. `ao.workflow.config.get` — read effective workflow config (workflow-config.v2.json)
7. `ao.workflow.config.validate` — validate workflow config
8. `ao.workflow.config.compile` — compile YAML workflow definitions to JSON
9. `ao.workflow.execute` — trigger synchronous workflow execution (no daemon required)

All tools follow the existing pattern: construct CLI args, call `self.execute_ao(args, project_root)`, parse JSON envelope.

## Key Files
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_mcp.rs` — new tool definitions
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/cli_types/workflow_types.rs` — existing CLI type definitions to map from
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/workflow_executor/` — workflow execution entry points
title: Add workflow management MCP tools (phases, pipelines, config)
